productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Kids Girls White Printed Top
description: Composition White round neck top, made of 100% cotton, has short puff sleeves, graphic print on the chest and a bow detail Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style in this pretty top from united colors of benetton. The graphic print adds an element of sweetness, while the soft cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with shorts or skirts and sandals.
